description: Verify that runPostRunAuditorHook returns a result with triggered:true and does not mutate the parent run's cost tracking. The hook result must not contain a cost field (cost is attributed to the spawned Forge-Master process).

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),'utf-8')); const hook=cfg?.hooks?.postRun?.invokeAuditor; if(!hook)throw new Error('invokeAuditor block missing'); if(hook.onFailure!==true)throw new Error('expected onFailure=true'); console.log('ok auditor spawn isolation config present');"

teardown.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const targets=[p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','auditor-state.json')]; for(const t of targets){try{fs.rmSync(t,{force:true});}catch{}} "
